methods.description: A comprehensive data analysis workflow involving PCA, FCA, cluster analysis, and RDA to analyze lake characteristics and chironomid communities.

steps.description: A principal component analysis (PCA) was performed on lake characteristics to provide an overview of environmental gradients in the training set.
Functional diversity of chironomid communities was analysed using fuzzy correspondence analysis (FCA) applied to the taxa-by-trait category dataset.
Cluster analysis based on Euclidean distances among taxa calculated on taxon coordinates along the first four FCA axes was applied to define functional groups.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis on FCA results

steps.description: Chironomid genera were grouped using Ward's method and the significance of the functional groups was assessed using the broken-stick model.
steps.searchable_summary: group chironomid genera using Ward's method and assess significance

steps.description: An FCA was performed to compare lakes along the elevation gradient based on the trait composition of their chironomid communities.
Cluster analysis based on Euclidean distances calculated on lake coordinates along the first four FCA axes was applied to identify lake clusters.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis on lake FCA results

steps.description: The 'IndVal' method was applied to identify indicator categories of traits associated with each lake cluster.
steps.searchable_summary: apply IndVal method to identify indicator traits

steps.description: Statistical comparisons of functional group relative abundances and site elevation among lake clusters were made by Kruskal-Wallis tests followed by multiple comparison tests.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Kruskal-Wallis tests on functional group abundances

steps.description: A redundancy analysis (RDA) using Monte Carlo unrestricted 999 permutation tests was performed to establish a model associating chironomid trait compositions to environmental characteristics of lakes.
steps.searchable_summary: perform RDA with Monte Carlo permutation tests

methods.method_name: Study Sites and Chironomid Training Set
methods.description: Collection and preparation of chironomid assemblage data from 100 lakes in Sweden for analysis.

steps.description: Surface sediment samples (0-1 cm) were retrieved from the deepest part of each lake using a modified Kajak-gravity corer.
steps.searchable_summary: collect surface sediment samples using Kajak-gravity corer

steps.description: Chironomid head capsules were hand-sorted from samples of wet sediment and identified under a microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: hand-sort and identify chironomid head capsules

steps.description: Chironomid counts were pooled to the genus level to fit the taxonomic resolution of the European Chironomidae Database.
steps.searchable_summary: pool chironomid counts to genus level
